efficacyPairs.lessonTeachSummary:
Let's test the word **"light"** in each sentence:

**"Please switch on the light."** — Here 'light' is a thing you can switch on — it's a noun.
**"This bag is very light."** — Here 'light' describes t
lessonLearningGoal: How to understand that the same word can be a different word class (noun, verb, adjective, etc.) in different sentences — this blows people's minds!
How to use the 'function test' — ask what job the word is doing right now
